'''gobazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shackly|shackly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shackly|shackly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gobazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gobazithi|gobazithi]] || [[word:gobaziji|gobaziji]] || [[word:gobazishi|gobazishi]] || [[word:gobaziki|gobaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gobazuthuthu|gobazuthuthu]] || [[word:gobazujuju|gobazujuju]] || [[word:gobazushushu|gobazushushu]] || [[word:gobazukuku|gobazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gobazuthu|gobazuthu]] || [[word:gobazuju|gobazuju]] || [[word:gobazushu|gobazushu]] || [[word:gobazuku|gobazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gobazufthuf|gobazufthuf]] || [[word:gobazufjuf|gobazufjuf]] || [[word:gobazufshuf|gobazufshuf]] || [[word:gobazufkuf|gobazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gobazethe|gobazethe]] || [[word:gobazeje|gobazeje]] || [[word:gobazeshe|gobazeshe]] || [[word:gobazeke|gobazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gobazothotho|gobazothotho]] || [[word:gobazojojo|gobazojojo]] || [[word:gobazoshosho|gobazoshosho]] || [[word:gobazokoko|gobazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gobazotho|gobazotho]] || [[word:gobazojo|gobazojo]] || [[word:gobazosho|gobazosho]] || [[word:gobazoko|gobazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gobazofthof|gobazofthof]] || [[word:gobazofjof|gobazofjof]] || [[word:gobazofshof|gobazofshof]] || [[word:gobazofkof|gobazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfthÃŸf|gobazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfjÃŸf|gobazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfshÃŸf|gobazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfkÃŸf|gobazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gobazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gobazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gobazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gobazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfthÃŸf|gobazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfjÃŸf|gobazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfshÃŸf|gobazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfkÃŸf|gobazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfthÃŸf|gobazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfjÃŸf|gobazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfshÃŸf|gobazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gobazÃŸfkÃŸf|gobazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gobazÃḊthÃḊ|gobazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gobazÃḊjÃḊ|gobazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gobazÃḊshÃḊ|gobazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gobazÃḊkÃḊ|gobazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gobazathatha|gobazathatha]] || [[word:gobazajaja|gobazajaja]] || [[word:gobazashasha|gobazashasha]] || [[word:gobazakaka|gobazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gobazatha|gobazatha]] || [[word:gobazaja|gobazaja]] || [[word:gobazasha|gobazasha]] || [[word:gobazaka|gobazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gobazafthaf|gobazafthaf]] || [[word:gobazafjaf|gobazafjaf]] || [[word:gobazafshaf|gobazafshaf]] || [[word:gobazafkaf|gobazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gobazasha|gobazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gobazshÃḋsha|gobazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazrosha|gobazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazmusha|gobazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobazyasha|gobazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogobaznkshÃḋsha|gogobaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogobaznkrosha|gogobaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogobaznkmusha|gogobaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogobaznkyasha|gogobaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gobabazasha|gobabazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gobabazshÃḋsha|gobabazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobabazrosha|gobabazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobabazmusha|gobabazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobabazyasha|gobabazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogobabaznkshÃḋsha|gogobabaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogobabaznkrosha|gogobabaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogobabaznkmusha|gogobabaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogobabaznkyasha|gogobabaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gebÃḊzasha|gebÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gebÃḊzshÃḋsha|gebÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gebÃḊzrosha|gebÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gebÃḊzmusha|gebÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gebÃḊzyasha|gebÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogebÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gogebÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogebÃḊznkrosha|gogebÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogebÃḊznkmusha|gogebÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogebÃḊznkyasha|gogebÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gobfazasha|gobfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gobfazshÃḋsha|gobfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobfazrosha|gobfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobfazmusha|gobfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobfazyasha|gobfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogobfaznkshÃḋsha|gogobfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogobfaznkrosha|gogobfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogobfaznkmusha|gogobfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogobfaznkyasha|gogobfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
